item.title: Example Title
item.description: Here is the cosdasdasdsfsfntent of your Markdown file.

item.title: Bash
item.description: pwd: Displays the present working directory. ls: Lists the contents of the current directory. echo: Prints a string of text, or value of a variable to the terminal.

item.title: Lexical
item.description: Rough Idea TILL ICG (Intermediate Code Generator) -> everything is front end and rest is backend

item.title: Lexical
item.description: Rough Idea TILL ICG (Intermediate Code Generator) -> everything is front end and rest is backend

item.title: C++
item.description: Linux distribution mainly consists of the following components Boot Loader Init System Display Renderer Display Manager Display Environments Package Managers All Linux Distros differ based on these 3 components

item.title: Hello
item.description: Rules of Rounding off If the digit to be dropped is smaller than 5, then the preceding digit is left unchanged.

item.title: Symbol Tables
item.description: 123456789 from manimlib import *class SquareToCircle(Scene): def construct(self): circle = Circle() circle.set_fill(BLUE, opacity=0.5) circle.set_stroke(BLUE_E, width=4) self.

item.title: About
item.description: This is some static page where you can write about yourself.dfdfffffffffffffffffffffffff
